claudeResult.resultText:
Done! I've built a CI status dashboard with:

**KPI Row** — 3 metrics showing Build Pass Rate (94%, trending up ✓), Avg Build Time (4m12s, trending down ✓), and Open Incidents (2, warning ⚠️).

**Build Durations Chart** — Bar chart displaying the last 7 days' build times in minutes (Mon 12, Tue 8, Wed 15, Thu 9, Fri 20, Sat 7, Sun 11).

**Deploy Counts Chart** — Line chart showing daily deploy counts for the same period (3, 5, 2, 6, 4, 7, 3).

All composed in a single Stack/Grid layout. The dashboard is live at the URL in the slot above — open it to view the full visualization.
